Maggie&Kirk

Three nights in Umbria, celebrating with our favorite people

7.22.27 – 7.25.27 · Allerona, Italy

– days until we say I do

7.22.27 · Allerona, Italy

Our Story

We met the old fashioned way — on Hinge.

What started as a match turned into a shared love of outdoor adventures, music, and staying active together. Somewhere between the trailheads and the playlists, we realized our friends got along just as well as we did.

We share the values that matter and just enough differences to keep things interesting — which is, we think, the makings of a perfect bond. Now we get to celebrate it with the people who mean the most to us, in Umbria.

Read the full story & see photos →
The Weekend

Three nights, one long celebration

From welcome drinks to the last coffee before you head home — here's how the weekend unfolds.

01
7.22.27 — Thursday

Welcome Party

Kick things off with drinks and good company as everyone settles in at SPAO. Casual, relaxed, and the start of a very good weekend. Details on time and dress code to follow.

02
7.23.27 — Friday

The Wedding

The big day. Ceremony, dinner, and dancing under the Umbrian sky. This is the one we've been waiting for — full timeline coming closer to the date.

03
7.24.27 — Saturday

Pool Party

Recovery day, done right. Sun, the pool at SPAO, and no schedule to keep. Come and go as you please.

04
7.25.27 — Sunday

Check Out

One last breakfast together before we all head home. Safe travels, and thank you for being part of our weekend.

Where We'll Be

SPAO, Allerona

Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortous

Tucked into the hills of Umbria, SPAO is home base for the whole weekend — everyone stays on site, so the celebration never really stops.

AddressSP50, 05011 Allerona TR, Italy
Accommodations$250 / person, full weekend
IncludedBreakfast & dinner daily
Available on siteLunch & drinks (à la carte)
Dates7.22.27 – 7.25.27
Getting There

However you'd like to arrive

Fly

Rome (FCO)

The nearest major airport, about a 2 hour drive to SPAO. Shuttle service will be available — details to come closer to the date.

Drive

Rent a Car from Rome

We love driving through Italy, and this is one of our favorite ways to see it. Pick up a car in Rome and make the scenic drive out to Umbria — SPAO has parking included on site, so no need to plan around it.

Train

Orvieto Station

Take the train into Orvieto, then a short car or cab ride to the venue. A relaxed, scenic alternative to driving the whole way.

Shuttle

Group Transport

We're arranging shuttles for the weekend. Sign up details and pickup points will be shared as we finalize the schedule.

Good to Know

Frequently asked questions

What should I wear?

Garden formal — think easy, breathable layers that can handle a warm Umbrian evening. Full dress code details for each event will be shared closer to the date.

Are kids welcome?

We love your little ones, but we've decided to keep the weekend adults-only so everyone can relax and celebrate. Thank you for understanding.

Can I bring a plus one?

Plus ones are noted on your invitation. If you're unsure whether yours includes a guest, just reach out to us directly.

Where should we stay?

We're arranging on-site rooms at SPAO for the weekend — see the Venue and Travel sections above for details, with booking info to follow.

What's the weather like in July?

Warm, sunny days and mild evenings — pack accordingly, and bring a swimsuit for the pool party.

By when do I need to RSVP?

We'll share our RSVP deadline once the form goes live. For now, just mark your calendar and stay tuned.

Do you have a gift registry?

Your presence is truly the present. For those who ask, our registry will be linked in the Registry section below once it's ready.

Still have a question?

Reach out anytime — our contact details will be added here, or you can find us through the RSVP form below.
